target_audience: First-time homebuyers aged 28-42 in the Seattle metro with household income $110k-$180k who have been renting 3+ years and feel priced out of the market

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Getting beat on every offer by cash buyers and investors
pain_points_solutions.solution: Proprietary off-market pocket listings and a pre-underwritten buyer program that makes your offer look like cash

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Realtors who ghost once you're under contract and leave you drowning in paperwork
pain_points_solutions.solution: Dedicated transaction coordinator assigned to every client with 24-hour response guarantee until close

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Feeling like you need 20% down or you can't buy anything in Seattle
pain_points_solutions.solution: Partnerships with 12 lenders offering 3-5% down programs most first-time buyers never hear about

offer: Free Seattle first-time buyer strategy session plus a custom off-market listings report delivered within 48 hours
risk_reversal: If we don't find you a home you love within 90 days, we'll buy you dinner at Canlis — on us
guarantees: Dedicated agent, not a junior, on every showing and negotiation
limited_availability: Only accepting 8 new buyer clients per month to keep service personal
lead_magnet: Free 2026 Seattle Neighborhood Affordability Map showing hidden pockets under $650k
top_stats: Closed 340+ homes for first-time buyers since 2017
Average client saves $23k off list price through our negotiation playbook
4.9 stars across 180+ Zillow and Google reviews
service_area: Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, and surrounding King County
